detail.description:
🌈 Welcome to Mia World — the ultimate safe life simulation & home design game designed for creativity, comfort, and fun.
This virtual city life game is developed with input from teachers and child experts, ensuring a safe, relaxing, and educational experience for everyone.
Whether you enjoy cozy simulation games, creative home design, or open-ended roleplay adventures, Mia World offers the perfect avatar city world for all ages.

🎮 LIFE SIMULATION GAMEPLAY & ROLEPLAY
